description: Introduction of Phase 2 to the trine-eval Self-Upgrade spec. Phase 1 (Sprints 1-6) closes 15 gaps against Anthropic's eval-driven-development playbook within existing project-type rubrics. Phase 2 expands the harness's mission to support a new project-type domain ('harness-build' / agent runtime harnesses), sourced from an externally-supplied playbook brought in by the user. This is a Method-axis scope expansion: the product vision in spec.md is being widened to add a new project-type vertical. Phase 2 also entails downstream Material-axis records (new rubric file, traps catalog) which will be classified as scheduled and suppressed when they land within Phase 2 sprint scope.

evidence.claim: Sprint 6 is the most recently active sprint and its declared scope was JIT context retrieval patterns only — Phase 2 / harness-build / agent-runtime rubric are not in its features array.

Pre-Phase-2 spec.md product vision was bounded to 'close 15 identified gaps against the playbook' (Anthropic eval-driven-dev playbook). It did not reference agent-runtime harnesses, harness-build, or any new project-type vertical.
evidence.verification: git show HEAD~1:.harness/spec.md | grep -i 'agent-runtime\|harness-build' || echo 'absent in prior revision'

evidence.claim: The eval-rubric registry currently lists five rubrics and does not include an agent-runtime-harness / harness-build rubric.
The change is user-initiated and deliberate: user explicitly supplied an external playbook document and asked to plan integration sprints. This satisfies the active (henkoten) criterion.
Phase 1 telemetry shows uniform PASS with no failure pattern that would force a domain pivot — corroborating that Phase 2 is additive expansion, not corrective response.

Suppression rule does not apply: Sprint 6 scope (JIT context retrieval) does not include spec.md expansion, rubric-registry expansion, or harness-build project-type work. Phase 2 introduction is therefore unscheduled relative to the active sprint, even though the user intentionally initiated it. Active+unscheduled is a valid combination.

andon_signal.reason: Pre-amendment: spec.md vision and feature list did not authorize Phase 2 work, risking orphaned sprints. Resolved by spec.md amendment + features.json bootstrap before Sprint 7 begins.
evidence: .harness/features.json (was absent — created as part of Phase 2 prep)

resolution_summary: Spec amended with Phase 1 / Phase 2 sections. features.json bootstrapped with 19 entries (16 implemented + 3 planned). Sprints 7-11 appended to sprints.json with council-recommended fixes folded in (unconditional Sprint 7 threshold; Should-NOT gates for prior-deliverable protection; ephemeral Sprint 10; templates/by-rubric/ layout for Sprint 8; playbook_stage field scoped to harness-build mode in Sprint 9).
